completed_tasks.name: Obsidian Phase-51 and Phase-52 notes created in vault
All Phase 52 UAT items passed (human + pytest)

decisions.decision: COMPLY-10 implemented as 2-tier FIPS annotation (approved/non-approved only)
decisions.rationale: REQUIREMENTS.md defines 3 tiers including 'certified' — D-01 in Phase 52 CONTEXT.md scopes 'certified' to a future CMVP attestation phase. User accepted deviation 2026-05-06.

decisions.decision: Phase 52 runs in parallel with Phase 51 — zero shared dependencies
decisions.rationale: Both depend on Phase 50 (v4.6 complete); no code overlap between QRAMM infra and compliance/health-check work.

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase for Phase 53: QRAMM Evidence Bridge. Read .planning/ROADMAP.md Phase 53 section and .planning/phases/51-qramm-core-infrastructure/ to understand the QRAMM backend surface before planning.
context_notes: v4.7 Governance & Compliance Platform is 2 of 6 phases done. Phases 51 and 52 ran in parallel and both shipped on 2026-05-06. Phase 53 is the next critical-path item — it bridges live scanner findings into QRAMM assessment answers. The QRAMM backend API (/api/qramm/) from Phase 51 is the foundation Phase 53 builds on.
